behavior: p_limit remains normalized and clamped before buyer_summary_inbox_scope_v1 is called.

Final returned rows are sliced to normalizedLimitGroups, so a 26-row RPC payload cannot publish more than 25 rows when the caller requested 25.
requestIds are derived from the bounded rows only.
returnedGroupCount and limitGroups are clamped to the caller bound.

p_offset and p_limit remain bounded before warehouse_issue_queue_scope_v4 is called.
